chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 761 - وَ سَأَلَهُ: عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يُصَلِّي وَ أَمَامَهُ ثُومٌ أَوْ بَصَلٌ قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.761 - He (Ali ibn Ja'far) asked him (Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as)) about a man praying while there is garlic or onion in front of him.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm."
